title: Produce 2-D landscape drawings using CAD software
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Produce 2-D landscape drawings using CAD software demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
